title: Admiral EDD Evaluation Specification
description: Machine-readable Definition of Done for a task. Each task declares deterministic checks (commands that must pass) and probabilistic checks (outcomes that need verification).

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this task accomplishes.

deterministic.description: Checks with deterministic outcomes — command + expected exit code.

command.description: Shell command to execute. Runs in project root.

working_dir.description: Working directory relative to project root. Defaults to project root.

probabilistic.description: Checks with probabilistic outcomes — require human or agent verification.

description.description: What to verify — the expected outcome in plain language.

evidence_command.description: Optional command that produces evidence for review (e.g., screenshot, output sample).

ci_required.description: Whether CI must pass before the task is considered done.

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must be complete before this task can be evaluated.
